infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: CircuitSage uses the camera to capture oscilloscope, multimeter, breadboard, and lab-bench evidence.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: CircuitSage lets you attach existing lab screenshots or bench photos for analysis.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: CircuitSage uses the microphone for hold-to-talk lab questions.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: CircuitSage uses speech recognition to turn spoken lab questions into text.
infoPlist.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: CircuitSage connects to your laptop backend on the local network during lab sessions.
